---
title: "LCGA_demo"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library("dplyr")
library("readr")
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(parameters)
library(tidyverse)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
lcgadir <- "/Users/shiyinliu/Desktop/CANDYLab/LCGA"
baseline_lcga <- read_csv(file.path(lcgadir, "T1_Golden_Demo_TIGER_03.03.22.csv"))
baseline_lcga_mdd <- baseline_lcga %>% 
                         filter(Group == "MDD")     
comos_lcga <- read_csv(file.path(lcgadir, "T1_Dx_MDD_Child&Parent_070121.csv"))
```

demographics

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
mean(baseline_lcga_mdd$Age.at.V1)
sd(baseline_lcga_mdd$Age.at.V1)

sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Sex == 2)
sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Gender == 3)

mean(baseline_lcga_mdd$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)
sd(baseline_lcga_mdd$BMI, na.rm = TRUE)

sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Ethnicity == 2)

sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Race == 7)

comos_lcga$anxiety_total = comos_lcga$Panic_Current_P_C + comos_lcga$Social_Current_P_C + comos_lcga$Simple_Current_P_C + comos_lcga$Agoraphobia_Current_P_C + comos_lcga$GAD_Current_P_C
comos_lcga <- comos_lcga %>%
  mutate(any_anxiety_dx = if_any(
    c(Panic_Current_P_C,
      Social_Current_P_C,
      Simple_Current_P_C,
      Agoraphobia_Current_P_C,
      GAD_Current_P_C),
    ~ .x %in% c(2, 3, 4)
  ))
sum(comos_lcga$any_anxiety_dx==TRUE)
sum(comos_lcga$Agoraphobia_Current_P_C == 4)
```

clinical characteristics
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
mean(baseline_lcga_mdd$CDRSR_total)
sd(baseline_lcga_mdd$CDRSR_total)
length(baseline_lcga_mdd$CDRSR_total)

mean(baseline_lcga_mdd$RADS_total)
sd(baseline_lcga_mdd$RADS_total)
length(baseline_lcga_mdd$RADS_total)

mean(baseline_lcga_mdd$MASC_total)
sd(baseline_lcga_mdd$MASC_total)
length(baseline_lcga_mdd$MASC_total)

sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Ethnicity == 2)

sum(baseline_lcga_mdd$Race == 7)
```
